Package org.apache.juneau.commons.svl.functions

Class RandomFunctions

java.lang.Object
org.apache.juneau.commons.svl.functions.RandomFunctions
public final class RandomFunctions extends Object
Random / UUID functions for the #{...} script catalog.

All rand* functions evaluate per-resolve and are NOT folded by stable-value folding (stable folding is Var-side only — function evaluation always runs). Use a Supplier<String> field to get fresh-per-.get() semantics, or a bare String field to capture once at bean construction.

Cryptographic strength:
  • RandomFunctions.Rand, RandomFunctions.RandInt, RandomFunctions.RandLong, RandomFunctions.RandString, RandomFunctions.RandChoice are backed by ThreadLocalRandom. Threadsafe; NOT cryptographically secure. Do not use for tokens, secrets, or session ids.
  • RandomFunctions.Uuid is backed by UUID.randomUUID() which uses SecureRandom — cryptographically strong.

  • Nested Class Summary

    Nested Classes
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    static class 
    RandomFunctions.Rand
    #{rand()} — random double in [0.0, 1.0).
    static class 
    RandomFunctions.RandChoice
    #{randChoice(option1, option2, ...)} — variadic.
    static class 
    RandomFunctions.RandInt
    #{randInt(max)} — random int in [0, max).
    static class 
    RandomFunctions.RandLong
    #{randLong(min, max)} — random long in [min, max] (inclusive both ends).
    static class 
    RandomFunctions.RandString
    #{randString(length)} — random alphanumeric [A-Za-z0-9] string of length characters.
    static class 
    RandomFunctions.Uuid
    #{uuid()} — random UUID via UUID.randomUUID().
